case_title: CANDIDA CASTRO VS. CARLOS AREVALO ET AL

docket_entries.description: (SC-221) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT AREVALO, CARLOS AS TO PLAINTIFF CASTRO, CANDIDA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $95.42 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, CARLOS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY CASTRO, CANDIDA AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, CARLOS MARTINEZ, NORMAN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, CANDIDA AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, CARLOS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-07-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, CARLOS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, CANDIDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AREVALO, CARLOS $2,242.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,322.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JANUARY 2, 2015, SELL THE LEXUS AUTOMOBILE WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, AND GIVE THE PROCEEDS OF THAT SALE, UP TO $2,242.00, TO THE PLAINTIFF AS FULL SATISFACTION OF THIS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST NORMAN A. MARTINEZ, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, CANDIDA AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, CARLOS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,197.72 AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, CARLOS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, NORMAN A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT NORMAN MARTINEZ WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO NORMAN A. MARTINEZ BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-31-2014 AT 10:00 AM.
